name: The Green
address: 32 Friendship St Unit A, Westerly, RI 02891
about: The Green is a hybrid indoor golf club and workshare venue located in downtown Westerly, RI. It offers a Trackman 4.0 golf simulator with a 16x10 impact screen for an immersive experience, alongside office and coworking spaces. The facility is a membership-based club that allows members and guests to book and access the golf simulator on demand, with leagues, lessons, and events also available. Memberships provide access to the simulator at discounted rates and include invitations to member-only clinics, fittings, and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman 4.0 technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Access to leagues, lessons, and member-only events
2500 sq ft of event space for group activities

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of on-site alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor with 16x10 impact screen for immersive experience
